log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Changeling — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:6+4=10 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 3 falling damage. HP: 175/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

Young Red Dragon attacks Changeling — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 14] HIT! 8 damage. Changeling — Iron Concentration HP: 59/67

=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Changeling — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Changeling — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Changeling — Iron Concentration.
→ Changeling — Iron Concentration healed for 6 HP. HP: 16/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Changeling — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 16 damage. Changeling — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
